Home / About

About WICS Agency

Built on trust, driven by excellence — serving Limbe since 2015.

9+ Years in Business
Our Story

From a Local Idea to Limbe's Trusted Agency

WICS Agency was established with a clear mission: to make essential services more accessible, faster, and more affordable for the people of Limbe and the surrounding area.

What started as a small documentation center in Mokundange has grown into a full-service agency offering everything from satellite TV subscriptions and insurance to international shipping and telecom services — all in one location, right beside the Port Authority Office.

Over nine years, we've built strong partnerships with major brands like AXA, DHL, CANAL+, DStv, StarTimes, and CAMTEL, allowing us to offer you the best service at competitive prices.

9+Years Experience
8+Services Offered
100%Customer Commitment

Our Mission

To provide fast, reliable, and affordable services to individuals and businesses in Limbe — making everyday tasks simple and stress-free for our community.

Our Vision

To become the most trusted multi-service agency in the South West Region, known for excellence, efficiency, and genuine care for every customer we serve.

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

Speed & Efficiency

We value your time. Our streamlined processes ensure you get things done quickly, without the usual bureaucratic delays.

Trust & Reliability

Nine years of consistent, honest service has built us a reputation as the most trusted agency in Mokundange.

Customer First

Every decision we make centers on delivering the best experience to the people and businesses we serve.

Transparency

We believe in clear, upfront pricing and honest communication — no hidden fees, no surprises.

Our Journey

9+ Years of Growth

2015

WICS Agency founded in Mokundange, Limbe

2017

Expanded to offer CANAL+ and DStv subscriptions

2019

Official AXA Insurance partner for motor coverage

2021

Added DHL Express and CAMTEL BLUE SIM services

2023

Launched 24/7 customer support via WhatsApp

2024+

Continuously growing and serving Limbe's community

Come Visit Us Today

Find us at Mokundange, Limbe — beside the Port Authority Office. We're open Monday through Saturday, 8 AM to 6 PM.

Get Directions Chat on WhatsApp

Your trusted partner for fast, reliable services in Limbe, Cameroon. Over 9 years of excellence.
